title: Sanji Returns to Luffy
description: On pages 16–18, this part focuses on Caesar Clown, Jinbe, Capone Bege, Luffy, Big Mom as Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the assassination plot against Big Mom begins taking shape.
scene: Sanji and Luffy reunite emotionally, turning the rescue mission into a direct conspiracy against Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you bastard! do you even know who you're speaking to!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm the genius scientist who can destroy the world, Caesar (LOWIN!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The "Straw hats" are coming here!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Give me a break!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't want to see those bastards ever again!!!

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: Cae- Caesar clown? You're wrong...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I'm BEEP'S sworn BROTHER...!!

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: "Gangster" Gastino!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Shuroro RoRoro!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: At least change that laugh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Is he even trying to fool us...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Gas... Tino...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I see, I got the wrong guy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: My bad.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're not wrong!! He's Caesar, no matter how you look at it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the hell, it's you after all!! Why the hell are you here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you think I want to be here!? You fool!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was captured and handed over to big mom because of you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And when I was in a life or death situation

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Dokun

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My heart was taken by this guy! So now I have to do what he says!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Tell TraFALGAR Law that I'm going to kill him the next time we meet!! You too, if I get a chance!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Easy now, you nuisance! What a waste of time.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Straw hat"...!! Will you ally with us or will you refuse?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: gyaah!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...then first of all...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Let me punch you for shooting pekoms!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait, Luffy!! You won't solve anything this way!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: But he shot my friend!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I won't forgive people who badmouths' father!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Stop, Gott!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It doesn't matter, just let him try it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: That's right, throw these bastards out!!!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Do you guys like big mom?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: We hate her!!!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: That's what you call an alliance!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can kill each other all you want afterwards, but right now you need to join forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: You all have something to "Gain"!!

dialogue.speaker: Capone Bege
dialogue.text: What's the plan !?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I've got a perfect one.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's do this quickly!! Get this over with already!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Time until the Banquet starts: 3 hours and 20 minutes

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: The Frontline has been decided!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Sanji Returns storyline with 43 dialogue beats. Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the crew joins Bege’s risky plan to attack Big Mom during the tea party.
